summary: Interpret alerts, assess risk, and plan remediation.
examples: Export alerts to share with engineering.
content:
## Overview
Interpret alerts, assess risk, and plan remediation.

### Why it matters
This guide turns a ZAP feature into a repeatable workflow you can share across teams.

### Preparation
- Confirm scope and permissions.
- Ensure required add-ons are installed.
- Decide how you will capture evidence.
title: Alerts and Prioritization (Workflow 9)
